<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one feature or fix per PR. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `main` (not pushing to `main` directly)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes for affected workspace(s)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes for affected workspace(s)
- [ ] `npm run test:stability` passes
- [ ] Updated [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) if I changed a route, Prisma model,
      socket event, env var, or documented behavior
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Respects free-tier constraints (no unbounded-growth structures, WS-only
      real-time, no pool/migration-flow changes)

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- Optional: UI screenshots, testing notes, follow-ups. -->
